top_prompt: I'm having a stroke and my words keep slurring, so I need to call my
bottom_prompt: My arm's gone weirdly numb and my words keep slurring, so I need to call my

generation.patient_term: my arm's gone weirdly numb and my words keep slurring

generation.rationale: Swaps a lay description of stroke symptoms for the clinical label while keeping the rest of the sentence identical; 'call my' funnels toward the high-frequency word 'doctor', which should be favored more strongly once the clinical term signals urgency.
